items.title: Business Name Registration (BN)
items.description: CAC business name registration with guidance on name availability, classification and documentation.

items.title: Company Registration (LTD)
items.description: End-to-end company incorporation (e.g., 1M share capital). We guide requirements, prepare filings and submit to CAC.

items.title: Incorporated Trustees
items.description: Support for Incorporated Trustees registration: constitution, trustees, publication steps and CAC filings.

items.title: Annual Returns
items.description: Filing of annual returns and routine compliance updates for CAC-registered entities.

items.title: Increase in Share Capital
items.description: Share capital increase filings and related documentation support.

items.title: Change of Name (Director / Proprietor)
items.description: Name change filings and documentation support for directors or proprietors.

items.title: Reprint (Lost / Misplaced Certificate)
items.description: Assistance with reprinting CAC certificates where the original is lost or misplaced.

items.title: Business Consulting
items.description: Practical guidance for structuring your business, documentation readiness, and incorporation strategy.

items.title: Trademark Registration
items.description: Trademark search guidance and registration support to protect your brand.

items.title: SCUML Registration
items.description: Support for SCUML registration for eligible businesses.
